---
name: Protocol improvement or feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the Decomposer protocol, adapter, or documentation
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Survival Condition

**Alive if**: [what success looks like]
**Dead if**: [what failure looks like]

## Problem

Describe the problem or gap you are addressing. Be specific about the failure mode.

## Proposed Change

Describe the change in one sentence. Keep it focused.

## Considered Alternatives

What else did you consider? Why did you choose this approach?

## Impact

- **What improves**: [e.g. clarity, actionability, platform coverage]
- **What risks**: [e.g. increased complexity, reduced honesty]
- **What is unchanged**: [what stays the same]

## Self-Check

- [ ] I have checked existing issues for duplicates.
- [ ] This change does not dilute the honesty constraint.
- [ ] This change does not add unnecessary complexity.
- [ ] I have described the survival condition (Alive if / Dead if).
